title: 守株待兔
meaning: 比喻不主动努力，希望得到意外收获

scenes.title: 兔子撞树
scenes.prompt: Chinese children book illustration, cute cartoon style, warm colors, consistent art style, a rabbit running fast and hitting a tree stump, motion lines, farm field background, sunny day
scenes.narration: 有一天，一只兔子撞到树桩上死了。

scenes.title: 农夫等待
scenes.prompt: Chinese children book illustration, cute cartoon style, warm colors, consistent art style, a farmer in brown clothes sitting lazily against the same tree stump, waiting, empty field, bored expression
scenes.narration: 农夫从此每天坐在树桩旁等兔子。

scenes.title: 田地荒芜
scenes.prompt: Chinese children book illustration, cute cartoon style, warm colors, consistent art style, the farmer in brown clothes still sitting by stump, overgrown weeds in field, other farmers working in background, contrast scene
scenes.narration: 结果田地都荒芜了，再也没有兔子来。
